mission_alignment: Relevant to a mission-conditioned capability gap and needs full intake, triage, and routing treatment.
notes: Example split-case submission from a third-party host.

intake.why_it_entered_the_system: Candidate appears relevant enough to justify full Discovery treatment.
intake.claimed_value: Potentially improves the system's ability to solve an active mission problem.
intake.initial_relevance_to_workspace: High mission relevance with unclear final adoption target.

triage.first_pass_summary: Promising candidate with likely structural value.
triage.problem_it_appears_to_solve: Improves the quality of future source adaptation or verification.
triage.extractable_value_hypothesis: Durable internal mechanism can be extracted into product-owned operating code.
triage.routing_recommendation: Route to Architecture for bounded mechanism extraction.
triage.stack_shape_summary: Source is conceptual/research-oriented rather than runtime-ready.
triage.boilerplate_vs_product_boundary: Underlying mechanism appears reusable; presentation-specific baggage should be excluded.
triage.fit_to_current_direction: Supports the self-improving source adaptation direction.
triage.reusability_across_surfaces: Likely reusable across Discovery and Architecture.
triage.operational_risk: Low runtime risk because no immediate runtime promotion is proposed.
triage.immediate_risks: Need to avoid over-importing source-specific baggage.

routing.why_this_route: Primary value is reusable internal operating logic rather than a runtime capability.
routing.why_not_alternatives: Forge would be premature because runtime form is not yet justified.
